judgment.summary: High-margin business with significant cash reserves facing severe revenue contraction and negative growth estimates.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS was -1.49 vs an estimate of 0.04 (a miss with a -3458.9% surprise); next earnings date is 2026-07-30.
positives: Gross margin 85.5% — exceptionally high profitability on sales.
Free cash flow (TTM) $2.41B — strong ability to generate cash.
negatives: Analyst growth est, current Q -97.1% — massive expected decline in upcoming earnings.
Operating margin -7.1% — business is currently operating at a loss.

news.paragraph: Coinbase shares have recently seen significant upward movement, with reports indicating the stock has skyrocketed. Additionally, Rothschild & Co Redburn has raised its price target for the company to $263 from $254 while maintaining a buy rating. Options traders should consider this positive analyst momentum and recent price volatility when evaluating potential contracts.
